response.overview: After losing her sisters Daisy and Camilla, Celeste looks back on the moments they shared growing up together. She remembers how different they all seemed and struggles to see what really connected them. As she sits with her memories, the small and ordinary moments begin to take on new meaning. Through grief and reflection, Celeste slowly starts to understand the quiet bond they always had. A story about loss, girlhood, and finding meaning in the moments that once felt small.
response.tagline: I still talk to you like you are in the next room.
response.title: After Silence
